title: Structural Beyond | SB
description: Simple mod that adds more structures to your world
body:
🌟 Structural Beyond 🌟
An immersive mod designed to enhance the world of Minecraft with new vanilla-style structures. Perfectly integrated into vanilla gameplay, this mod introduces a curated selection of unique structures that are naturally generated in different biomes.

## ✨ Features

🌍 Explore 12+ Unique Structures

- 🏕️ **The Camp** - A small campsite with loot and surprises. - 🗼 **Square Tower** - A mysterious tower guarding treasures. - 🔮 **The Sorcerer's House** - The dwelling of a powerful mage. - 🌊 **Underwater Sword** - A legendary weapon submerged beneath the ocean. - 🪨 **The Deepslate Pillar** - A towering structure deep underground. - 🍄 **Mushroom House** - A cozy home hidden in mushroom biomes. - 🌱 **Earth Golem** - A natural guardian protecting the land.

🏰 Lore-Friendly Integration
Each structure is vanilla-style to integrate naturally with the biomes and world-building of Minecraft.

---

🚧 Currently in Beta 🚧
Expect updates with more structures and improvements!

📢 Have feedback or found a bug?

💖 Support by donating!

Your support helps me improve and update the mod. Thank you!

🔧 Compatibility modloader

🌟 Mod Usage in Modpacks

You are free to include **Structural Beyond** in your modpacks, provided that the mod is linked back to its original source. You may also share the mod, but please make sure to give appropriate credit to the creator, D4vide106, and provide a link to this page or the official sources on Modrinth, CurseForge, or other authorized platforms.

Created by D4vide106
My first mod — thank you for your support!
